subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of God hath spoken, bearing witness unto this Revelation, through which the Speaker of Sinai hath uttered His voice and the Trump hath been sounded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نطق لسان الله و شهد لهذا الظهور الذی به تکلم مکلم الطور و نفخ فی الصور و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for service, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God
